title: azukia angularis var. nipponensis
intro: Azukia angularis var. nipponensis, also known as the Japanese mountain azukia or Japanese mountain bean, is a plant species native to Japan. It is a type of legume that is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Azukia angularis var. nipponensis include the potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
